title: Will Mandela Barnes be the Democratic nominee for Governor in Wisconsin?

current.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 4%, modal NO) — staying out.
current.rationale_summary: The evidence suggests that Mandela Barnes is not currently identified as a candidate in the Wisconsin gubernatorial race. David Crowley has reentered the race with significant endorsements, while Sara Rodriguez has dropped out, creating a dynamic but not necessarily favorable environment for Barnes. No direct evidence links Barnes to the race, and the base rate of multiple candidates in Wisconsin
key_drivers: David Crowley's reentry into the race
Lack of direct evidence linking Mandela Barnes to the race
reference_classes: Competitive gubernatorial races with multiple candidates
Incumbent base rates in primary elections
